---
title: "Create Member Profile"
description: "Submit your information to create a member profile on the RC42 Social Psychology portal."
toc: false
---

::: {.content-block style="max-width: 800px; padding: 3rem 0;"}
::: {.section-header .text-center}
::: {.section-tag}
Community
:::
<h2>Join the Directory</h2>
<p>Complete the form below to submit your information for a public member profile on the RC42 Social Psychology portal.</p>
:::

<form name="create-profile" method="POST" data-netlify="true" netlify-honeypot="bot-field" class="form-rc42" action="/participate/index.html">
  <div class="form-header">
    <p>This form collects information exclusively for the RC42 members directory. It is <strong>separate</strong> from official ISA membership registration. Your data will be reviewed by the board prior to publication.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Honeypot field for spam prevention -->
  <p style="display:none;">
    <label>Don't fill this out: <input name="bot-field"></label>
  </p>

  <div class="form-section-title">Required Information</div>

  <label for="full-name">Full name <span class="required-mark">*</span></label>
  <input type="text" id="full-name" name="full-name" required placeholder="e.g., Jane Doe">

  <label for="email">Email for verification <span class="required-mark">*</span></label>
  <input type="email" id="email" name="email" required placeholder="your.email@institution.edu">
  <div class="form-help">Used for verification only. It will not be published unless you explicitly provide a public email below.</div>

  <label for="affiliation">Primary Affiliation <span class="required-mark">*</span></label>
  <input type="text" id="affiliation" name="affiliation" required placeholder="University or institution name">

  <label for="country">Country <span class="required-mark">*</span></label>
  <input type="text" id="country" name="country" required placeholder="Country of your primary affiliation">

  <label for="bio">Short Biography <span class="required-mark">*</span></label>
  <textarea id="bio" name="bio" required placeholder="A brief description of your academic background, current position, and main areas of work (150–300 words recommended)."></textarea>

  <label for="research-interests">Research Interests <span class="required-mark">*</span></label>
  <textarea id="research-interests" name="research-interests" required placeholder="List your main research interests, separated by commas."></textarea>

  <label for="rc42-relationship">Relationship with RC42 <span class="required-mark">*</span></label>
  <select id="rc42-relationship" name="rc42-relationship" required>
    <option value="">-- Select your status --</option>
    <option value="current-member">Current ISA RC42 member</option>
    <option value="former-member">Former ISA RC42 member</option>
    <option value="interested">Interested in joining RC42</option>
    <option value="collaborator">Collaborator / affiliated scholar</option>
    <option value="other">Other</option>
  </select>

  <div class="form-section-title">Optional Information</div>

  <label for="city">City</label>
  <input type="text" id="city" name="city" placeholder="City">

  <label for="photo-url">Photo URL</label>
  <input type="url" id="photo-url" name="photo-url" placeholder="https://example.com/your-photo.jpg">
  <div class="form-help">Provide a URL to a professional photo. Alternatively, you can email a photo to the board after submission.</div>

  <label for="orcid">ORCID</label>
  <input type="url" id="orcid" name="orcid" placeholder="https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000">

  <label for="google-scholar">Google Scholar</label>
  <input type="url" id="google-scholar" name="google-scholar" placeholder="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=...">

  <label for="linkedin">LinkedIn</label>
  <input type="url" id="linkedin" name="linkedin" placeholder="https://www.linkedin.com/in/...">

  <label for="website">Personal Website</label>
  <input type="url" id="website" name="website" placeholder="https://your-website.com">

  <label for="public-email">Public Email</label>
  <input type="email" id="public-email" name="public-email" placeholder="Optional email to display publicly on your profile">

  <label for="publications">Selected Publications</label>
  <textarea id="publications" name="publications" placeholder="List up to 5 selected publications (APA format or similar). Include DOIs if available."></textarea>

  <div class="form-section-title">Consent & Submission</div>

  <div class="consent-group">
    <div style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
      <input type="checkbox" id="consent-publish" name="consent-publish" required>
      <label for="consent-publish">I consent to have my profile information published on the RC42 Social Psychology portal. <span class="required-mark">*</span></label>
    </div>
    <div>
      <input type="checkbox" id="consent-store" name="consent-store" required>
      <label for="consent-store">I consent to having this submission stored for editorial review by the RC42 board. <span class="required-mark">*</span></label>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button type="submit" class="btn-rc42-primary">Submit Profile for Review</button>
  </div>
</form>
:::
